name: Ripple Touch

teachesLevels.label: Counting sequences and number recognition through tap-based exploration

description:
Build: __BUILD_STAMP__

Ripple Touch — Interactive Maths Game Template

This is the official starting point for building games on the Interactive Maths platform. Fork this repo and replace the game logic to create your own curriculum-aligned maths game.

WHAT IT DOES:
Tap anywhere on the screen to create colourful ripple effects with sound. Collect eggs by tapping — every few taps earns one egg. A simple tap-counting mechanic designed to demonstrate the full game scaffold.

WHAT IT TEACHES:
Free-play sensory exploration. The game mechanic intentionally simple so the focus is the platform scaffold, not the curriculum content.

FOR DEVELOPERS:
- Replace src/game/rippleGame.ts with your own game logic
- Replace src/screens/RippleScreen.tsx with your game canvas
- Update public/manifest.json with your game metadata
- See GAME_GUIDE.md for the full guide

TECH: React 19, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Web Audio API, PWA-ready.
